# Modonty

> Modonty (مدونتي) is a bilingual Arabic-first content platform and business directory focused on Saudi Arabia and Egypt. We publish SEO-optimized articles and detailed business profiles for Arabic-speaking audiences.

Modonty connects businesses with readers through high-quality content, structured data, and industry-specific classification. The platform supports Organization and LocalBusiness profiles with full contact, address, and social media integration.

- Primary language: Arabic (ar-SA)
- Secondary: Arabic Egypt (ar-EG)
- Content types: Articles, Business Profiles, Categories, Industries, Tags, FAQ
- Structured data: JSON-LD (Article, Organization, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, CollectionPage, BreadcrumbList, Person)

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.modonty.com/): Featured articles, trending content, and platform overview
- [Categories](https://www.modonty.com/categories): Browse all article categories
- [Clients](https://www.modonty.com/clients): Business directory with detailed profiles
- [Trending](https://www.modonty.com/trending): Most popular articles
- [News](https://www.modonty.com/news): Latest news and newsletter
- [About](https://www.modonty.com/about): About the platform
- [Contact](https://www.modonty.com/contact): Contact page
- [FAQ](https://www.modonty.com/help/faq): Frequently asked questions

## Content Structure

- [Articles](https://www.modonty.com/articles): SEO-optimized articles with Article + FAQPage + Person + BreadcrumbList schema
- [Category Pages](https://www.modonty.com/categories): CollectionPage + ItemList + DefinedTerm schema per category
- [Client Profiles](https://www.modonty.com/clients): Organization/LocalBusiness + ContactPoint + GeoCoordinates + OpeningHours schema per business
